teachers.title: Teacher Profile & Workspaces
teachers.description: Houses the complete cloud synchronized workspace data of a teacher, including students ledger, appointments roster, preference configurations, and calendar elements.

userId.description: The exact Firebase safe User ID matching auth.uid

subject.description: The educational subject of the classes

students.description: A list of students containing profiles, sessions, payments log, study notes, and Whatsapp structures

examAppointments.description: List of queued school exam dates for student cohorts

/teachers/{userId}.description: Container housing complete educational workspace records per registered authenticated account.
